items.content_html:
Language Barriers in Cross-Border Medical Care

 

跨境就医语言障碍与沟通困境

 

Report for United States | 美国报告

 

________________________________________________________________________________

Executive Summary | 执行摘要

This report addresses healthcare challenges for patients from United States seeking medical treatment in China. Aether Dragon Medical specializes in providing end-to-end support for international patients. We do not diagnose or treat - we serve as your medical crutch, translation manager, and full-process guide in China.

本报告探讨来自美国患者在中国就医时面临的医疗挑战。烛龙国际医疗专注于为国际患者提供端到端支持。我们不诊断或治疗——我们作为中国境内的医疗拐杖、翻译管家和全程向导。

Pain Point Analysis | 痛点分析

Language Barriers in Cross-Border Medical Care

跨境就医语言障碍与沟通困境

Challenge: Language Barriers in Cross-Border Medical Care

International patients face language barriers, system navigation difficulties, cultural adaptation issues, logistical complexities, and information asymmetry when seeking medical care in China.

Solutions | 解决方案

Aether Dragon Medical provides: professional medical translation, hospital and expert matching, expedited appointments, transparent cost management, comprehensive logistics support, and continuous follow-up care.

Contact | 联系

For patients from United States:

WECHAT: 13921915089, 13816488908, Wxleooo, w886854321
EMAIL: helpeveryday@foxmail.com, hwhgongzuoshi@qq.com, blackcatart@qq.com
Service: 24/7 Emergency Hotline | Mon-Sun 8:00-22:00 Beijing Time
Response: Within 2 hours | Video consultation within 24-48 hours
